title: NBT Autocomplete
description: Adds suggestions for NBT tags in commands
body:
## About

**NBT Autocomplete** is a client-side mod adding suggestions for NBT tags in commands.

When typing NBT tag of entity, block or item it shows you list of available tags and their types.

## Examples
